features.name: Restore repository development harness
features.behavior: Restore a restartable root harness for the canonical marketplace source repository while keeping every installed plugin payload self-contained.

evidence.summary: Fresh GitHub clone at bf453ffc6ccb46346d702603a6df5e40beff5b34 ran ./init.sh with 7/7 tests passing; root harness files were present, plugin-payload exclusion passed, and remote marketplace installation plus fresh-process discovery passed.
